# TDD Checklist

## 1. Target Behavior

| Item | Detail |
|---|---|
| Requirement / Bug Ref |  |
| Expected Behavior |  |
| Current Behavior |  |
| Test Seam | Unit / API / E2E / Integration |

## 2. RED — Failing Test

| Item | Detail |
|---|---|
| Test Name / Path |  |
| Failure Before Fix |  |
| Why It Fails for the Right Reason |  |

## 3. GREEN — Minimal Fix

| Item | Detail |
|---|---|
| Changed Files |  |
| Fix Summary |  |
| Why This Addresses the Behavior |  |

## 4. REFACTOR — Cleanup

| Item | Detail |
|---|---|
| Refactor Performed? | Yes / No |
| Reason |  |
| Behavior Preserved By |  |

## 5. Verification

```bash
# commands run
```

| Test / Check | Result | Notes |
|---|---|---|
|  | Pass/Fail |  |

## 6. Known Gaps

- 

## 7. Handoff

| To | Reason | Evidence |
|---|---|---|
| qa-agent | QA verification |  |
